text.title: Stakeholder Analysis — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

branch.when: sponsor_named == true AND stakeholder_count >= 3 AND grid_complete == false

conclusion.verdict: build RACI + comms plan from the grid

example.trace: ENG-42 → sponsor=CFO → 6 stakeholders → grid complete → RACI for 4 major decisions
